sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83449" key="plakounth/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλᾰκουντ-ήριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83449.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for making cakes</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τήγανον</foreign> Mariaap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:p.236B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.Alch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.236B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
